'''Xerithin Chemical Combinations''' was a weapons manufacturer that specialized in chemical-based weapons. It operated mainly during the days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The company manufactured the [[BGA-900 Bio-Guard]].

{{Company-stub}}
